series_metadata.series_title: Approved Structural Products and Highway Structural Systems
series_metadata.series_description: Wall systems, Mechanically Stabilized Earth (MSE) shop drawings, MSE wall design calculations, noise barrier wall systems, precast culvert systems and other highway structural product and structural systems.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain until superceded by revised approval requests or until no longer of administrative value. ; Paper: Retain until superceded by revised approval requests or until no longer of administrative value., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Recycle
